settings.title: Meet the Crew Behind the Greenfield Vans
settings.excerpt: The four people who turn up at your gate each have a corner of the trade they care about most.
settings.body:
People often ask who actually does the work once a design is signed off. Here is the Greenfield crew, the four people who turn up at your gate in the vans.

Marek runs the builds and can set a drystone edge faster than the rest of us can mix mortar. He learned the trade from his father and still measures twice on every step and retaining wall before a single stone goes down. Priya handles planting plans and keeps a notebook of every soil type we have met on the round, so she already knows which corner of your garden will fight back.

Who does what

Tom is our machinery hand and the calmest person to have nearby when a stump will not budge. He maintains the kit himself, which is why the mini-digger rarely lets us down mid-job. Aoife joined us last spring straight from college and already spots a pest problem before any of us do, often from the far side of a bed.

  • Marek leads hard landscaping and structures
  • Priya plans the planting and reads the soil
  • Tom runs the machines and keeps them serviced
  • Aoife handles plant health and aftercare

The reason we work as a settled team rather than hiring day labour is simple. By the third visit, we know your access, your gate latch, and the spot where the hose reaches. That memory saves you time and saves us guesswork.

When you book Greenfield, you get the same faces each visit. We think that matters more than a glossy brochure. If you ever want to ask one of them a direct question about your garden, just catch them at the van. They would rather you asked.
